evidence.scientific_clarity: Sankey clearly shows 1120→1000→820 split into Train/Val/Test/Reject with proportional flow widths; all counts labeled on nodes.
evidence.typography: Arial used throughout (not DejaVu Sans), 12px node labels and 15px title are readable; however PDF is Kaleido/Skia-rasterized so fonttype=42 is irrelevant and text is not selectable.
evidence.palette: Distinct hues per stage; colorblind risk: red (#F44336) for Test and green (#4CAF50) for Cleaned use the red/green pair that is problematic for deuteranopia, and red is used directionally for a terminal node rather than a directional signal.
evidence.layout_density: 860×500 canvas is well-used; node labels sit outside bars without overlap; Reject node is small but legible; no excessive whitespace.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption matches figure counts exactly; no legend needed (nodes are self-labeled); title duplicates caption topic but is not harmful; Reject count (180) in SVG/figure differs from caption's implied 120+60=180 — consistent.
evidence.vector_fidelity: figure.pdf is produced by Kaleido (Skia/PDF m148) and contains only /Subtype /Image objects — text is rasterized, not selectable vector; no font entries in PDF.
evidence.file_format: figure.pdf (104 KB), figure.png (156 KB), figure.svg (9.3 KB), caption.tex, and gen_figure.py all present and non-trivial.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption states specific numbers (1120 raw, 1000 pass cleaning, 120 rejected, 60 removed by quality filter, 820 filtered, 600/120/100 split) and explains flow-width encoding and color scheme.

overall_strengths: All required output files are present and non-trivial; the SVG is true vector with selectable text and correct Arial font.
Caption is precise and data-rich, matching every node count in the figure, with a clear narrative of the pipeline stages.
overall_weaknesses: figure.pdf is a rasterized image-in-PDF (Kaleido/Skia), not a true vector PDF — text is not selectable and fonttype=42 is not applied.
Red (#F44336) and green (#4CAF50) are used as stage colors, creating a red-green pair that fails deuteranopia colorblind safety checks.
